Plan Identifier (HEDIS) CHAR 3 4 4 4 4 4
HEDIS_PLAN_TYPE Plan Type (HEDIS) CHAR 30 5 5 5 5 5
HEDIS_ORG_TYPE Plan Organization Type (HEDIS) CHAR 10 6 6 6 6 6

HEDIS_BENE_STATE_CD State Code for Beneficiary (Postal) CHAR 2 8 8 8 8 8

HEDIS_SEX_CD3 Beneficiary sex assigned at birth. Sex (HEDIS) CHAR 1 10 10 10 10 10
HEDIS_BENE_DOB Beneficiary date of birth (HEDIS) DATE 8 11 11
